Systems Conferences - System Design Transformation Principles

Network graphs visualizations of papers classifications for VLDB 2023 and OSDI 2023 conferences based on Joy Arulraj's principles taxonomy.

Conferences: VLDB 2023 papers (Left) OSDI 2023 papers (Right) Links connect papers sharing >= 1 principles (line width = shared tags count)
Conferences: VLDB 2023 papers (Left) OSDI 2023 papers (Right) Links connect papers sharing >= 2 principles (line width = shared tags count)
Categories: Papers (VLDB) Principles (Taxonomy tags)
Categories: Papers (OSDI) Principles (Taxonomy tags)
